personality_one_liner: A command-center for Gen Z finances—sharp, high-contrast, neon-powered, yet visually spacious and totally approachable.

spacing.rule: Avoid unnecessary spacing; rely on exact scale tokens. Use generous padding inside cards but tight groupings for related data.

do's: Use on the bottom tab bar and sticky headers to maintain context while scrolling.
Pair with a ≥75% surface-tinted base to guarantee text readability in dark mode.
dont's: Never use on form fields or list rows.
Do not rely purely on blur for contrast—always include the dark tint base.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: A high-level command center showing all balances, greetings, and monthly spending vs last month.

states.loading: Skeleton UI for balances with subtle pulsing on surfaceSecondary.
states.empty: Onboarding splash suggesting users log their first transaction or link an account.
states.error: Error boundary card showing 'Unable to load balances' with a retry button in brandPrimary.

screens.layout: Use a top summary strip featuring the user's name and total balance. Below, a 2-col grid for savings, investing, and cash balance cards. Add a full-width summary card at the bottom comparing this month vs last month. Balances use Bebas Neue in size 4xl to anchor the screen.

screens.name: Transactions
screens.purpose: Manual transaction logger and visual breakdown of spending by category.

states.empty: Empty state illustration of neon green savings, prompting user to log their first transaction.
states.error: Standard error prompt with a retry button.

screens.layout: Top half contains pie/bar charts summarizing current month spending. Bottom half is a scrollable list of transactions. Use a sticky Floating Action Button (FAB) or fixed bottom CTA container for 'Add Transaction'.

screens.name: AI Advisor
screens.purpose: A chat interface powered by Claude API providing personalized financial advice.

states.loading: Shimmering chat bubbles mimicking typing indicators.
states.empty: Initial greeting from AI (using the generated AI avatar) with 2-3 suggested prompt chips.
states.error: Inline error bubble in red indicating 'Connection lost, please retry'.

screens.layout: Chat interface. AI messages use surfaceSecondary background with onSurface text. User messages use surfaceTertiary background. Include a fixed input area at the bottom inside KeyboardAvoidingView.

screens.name: Investment Hub
screens.purpose: Tracker for manually logged stock/ETF/401k holdings and AI-suggested beginner stocks.

states.empty: Empty portfolio visual with a prompt to 'Log your first holding'.
states.error: Error card indicating failure to load portfolio data.

screens.layout: Top section features a simple portfolio breakdown chart and total holding value. Followed by a vertical list of current holdings. Bottom section includes horizontally scrolling cards for AI-suggested beginner-friendly stocks based on risk tolerance.

screens.name: Goals
screens.purpose: Savings goals tracker with progress bars and AI calculated timeline.

states.empty: Empty state illustration prompting the user to create their first goal.
states.error: Standard error message with a retry option.

screens.layout: A vertical stack of cards. Each card displays the goal name, emoji, target amount, a prominent progress bar in brandPrimary, and a subtext calculating how many weeks/months remaining to reach the goal.

empty_state_savings.alt: Empty state illustration of a neon green stylized piggy bank

ai_advisor_avatar.alt: AI Advisor glowing neon green brain avatar

instructions_to_main_agent: Adhere strictly to the 'Dark-First Utility DARK' aesthetic. Use Bebas Neue for all major numeric headers and section titles to reinforce the structural hierarchy.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use the provided #121214 surface color to reduce contrast fatigue, especially on screens with dense financial data.
Bebas Neue looks best in all-caps. Apply text-transform: uppercase where necessary for Bebas typography.
Implement a gradient-to-dark scrim pattern whenever text is placed on top of background imagery (like in the Onboarding flow or top Dashboard summary cards).
For the AI Advisor chat, differentiate the user and AI messages via subtle background tints (surfaceSecondary vs surfaceTertiary) and use the provided ai_advisor_avatar image.
Integrate Phosphor icons as the primary icon set. Use consistent weight (either all outlined or all filled, except for tab bars where outlined-inactive/filled-active is allowed).
Implement haptic feedback natively as mapped in the 'haptics' section. Haptics should be subtle to reinforce tactile feel.
